source: hand-authored initial narrow-gate rule; regenerated by h_cl_linear_ramp_stage2.py after 07-19 halves-verified re-run
gate_shape: narrow — persistence at 0-5h all regimes, L1 elsewhere
rationale: cl 07-12 Stage 2 (h_cl_linear_ramp_stage2.py) showed all 9 regimes SHIP at 0-5h band even under τ scan noise. Longer bands halves-diverge from HRRR anomaly window contamination. Narrow gate captures the physically-real short-lead win without overreaching. See project_cl_persistence_investigation.

fit_rules.SHIP means: replace cl (cloud_cover_low) with persistence-of-obs (flat carry) at these (regime, lead_band) cells at runtime
fit_rules.SKIP means: leave cl as pipeline produced (L1 raw for cl outside L3/L4 applicability set)
